vision: A mobile app for individuals to manage daily tasks efficiently.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to create new tasks with essential details

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to create a task with a title, so that I can record what I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button Then I see a form to enter task details
Given I am on the task creation form When I enter a title and save Then the task appears in my task list

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to add a due date to my task, so that I can track when it needs to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a task When I tap the due date field Then I see a date picker
Given I have selected a due date When I save the task Then the due date is displayed with the task

epics.name: Task Management
epics.description: Allow users to update and remove tasks

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I tap the complete checkbox Then the task is marked as complete
Given a task is marked complete When I view the task list Then the task shows a completed visual indicator

stories.title: Delete a task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove tasks I no longer need
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I swipe or tap delete Then I see a confirmation prompt
Given I confirm deletion When the action completes Then the task is removed from my list

epics.name: Task Viewing
epics.description: Display tasks to the user in an organized manner

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I am viewing the task list When tasks exist Then each task shows its title and due date

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Enable users to filter tasks by completion status

stories.title: Filter tasks by incomplete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to filter tasks to show only incomplete ones, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given the incomplete filter is active When I complete a task Then it is removed from the current view

stories.title: Filter tasks by complete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to filter tasks to show only completed ones, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I select the complete filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given the complete filter is active When no completed tasks exist Then I see an empty state message
